basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Research Investigator, Research Assistant and More Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Research Investigator (RI): Graduate in any discipline with experience of data collection in remote tribal areas (BSW will be given preference). Fluency in Marathi and English. Willing to travel and stay in tribal remote areas. Research Assistant (RA): Post-Graduate in any discipline with experience of data collection and monitoring fieldwork in remote tribal areas (MSW will be given preference). Fluency in Marathi and English. Willing to travel in tribal remote areas, coordinating data collection and dealing with multiple stakeholders in the field. Research Officer (RO): PhD in Social Work or in Social Sciences with special focus on education, experience of working in field of tribal education, having published research papers in the domain of education. Candidates who are about to submit their PhD or waiting for PhD viva are eligible to apply. Masters in Social Work with focus on Tribal issues and with good academic writing skills, experience in coordination of field work, willing to travel extensively in tribal areas. Fluency in Marathi and English, sensitive to tribal issues and willing to commit to tribal developmental issues. Secretariate-cum-Accountant: Graduate in any discipline with desirable knowledge of accounts. Willing to engage in all kinds of secretarial work. Working knowledge of statistical software and other digital skills.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the TISS Recruitment 2026 is 22 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Investigator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies announced by TISS for various posts, including Research Investigator, Research Assistant, Research Officer, and Secretariate-cum-Accountant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for Research Investigator (RI)?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Research Investigator (RI) is a Graduate degree in any discipline, with a preference for BSW. Experience in data collection in remote tribal areas is also required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TISS Recruitment 2026 involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an online or offline interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates awaiting their PhD results apply for the Research Officer (RO) post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who are about to submit their PhD or are waiting for their PhD viva are eligible to apply for the Research Officer (RO) position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the required language skills for the Research Investigator and Research Assistant roles?
faq.answer: Fluency in both Marathi and English is a mandatory requirement for both Research Investigator (RI) and Research Assistant (RA) positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for TISS Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official TISS website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application link?
faq.answer: The official notification and the direct link to apply online are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
